_fixture_meta.source: DOCS-DERIVED, LAYER-2 RECONCILED (2026-06-26). Field shapes captured from the Paddle webhook simulator; the 'approved' status literal verified against Paddle docs + paddle-go-sdk AdjustmentStatus constants. This fixture holds the APPROVED state (the delivery that authorizes reversal) — the simulator emits pending_approval, so see adjustment.pending_approval.json for the ignore path.
_fixture_meta.reconcile: RESOLVED: (1) action enum = {credit, refund, chargeback, chargeback_reverse, chargeback_warning, chargeback_warning_reverse, credit_reverse}; allowlist {refund, chargeback} is the money-returning subset — CONFIRMED. (2) status enum = {pending_approval, approved, rejected, reversed}; approved literal is exactly 'approved' (Correction B gate confirmed). Live refunds enter pending_approval and need Paddle approval; chargebacks are created already 'approved'. (3) transaction_id path CONFIRMED, NO custom_data.user_id on adjustments (Correction 8a). (4) totals are STRINGS — CONFIRMED.
_fixture_meta.locks: data.action='refund', data.status='approved' (verified literal), data.transaction_id links to a purchases row, totals.total is a STRING, no custom_data.user_id
